response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ experience as a hard minimum, but the candidate has only roughly 6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015). Their career is centered on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web work, with no evidence of formal technical leadership of a cloud compute platform or large-scale C++ infrastructure ownership. While there is some distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, the core technical and leadership bar for this role is not met.
strengths: Some distributed-systems exposure handling millions of HTTP req/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Broad full-stack and polyglot experience across backend, infra, and DevOps
Active in mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses (Selenium, Web Internals, TDD)
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement
No explicit technical-leadership / tech-lead role mentoring engineers on a cloud platform
No production cloud compute platform architecture experience at the scale implied by the JD

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (≈6 months vs 8 years required)
Lack of formal technical leadership / mentoring role
